# CWE-921 safe: restricted file permissions and path
lang: go
file: CWE-921-safe.go
---
package sample

// CWE-921 mitigated: secrets stored under private directory with mode 0600.

import (
	"net/http"
	"os"
	"path/filepath"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

func StoreIntegrationKeySafe() gin.HandlerFunc {
	return func(c *gin.Context) {
		key := c.PostForm("api_key")
		dir := filepath.Join(os.Getenv("APP_SECRET_DIR"), "integrations")
		if err := os.MkdirAll(dir, 0700); err != nil {
			c.JSON(http.StatusInternalServerError, gin.H{"error": err.Error()})
			return
		}
		path := filepath.Join(dir, "integration.key")
		if err := os.WriteFile(path, []byte(key), 0600); err != nil {
			c.JSON(http.StatusInternalServerError, gin.H{"error": err.Error()})
			return
		}
		c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"stored": true})
	}
}
